pkgmetadata.longdescription: pathableAboutObject-oriented pathsKey features Traverse resources like paths Access resources on demand with separate accessor layerUsage.. code-block python from pathable import DictPath d { parts { part1 { name Part One, }, part2 { name Part Two, }, }, } dp DictPath(d) Concatenate paths with parts dp parts Stat path keys part2 in parts Open path dict with parts.open() as parts_dict print(parts_dict)
